title: Fox-owned Tubi expands its free streaming service to five Latin American countries
text: Tubi, the free ad-supported streaming service owned by Fox, is now available in Costa Rica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, and Panama — an expansion that has doubled its global footprint and signals the company's interest in capturing more Latin American viewers.

title: Fox posts higher revenue on ad sales strength
text: Fox Corp missed Wall Street quarterly revenue estimates

title: Fox Corporation (FOX) CEO Lachlan Murdoch on Q4 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOX ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 10, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Gabrielle Brown - Chief Investor Relations Officer Lachlan Murdoch - Executive Chair & Chief Executive Officer Steve Tomsic - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants John Hodulik - UBS Phil Cusick - JPMorgan Robert Fishman - MoffettNathanson Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Doug Mitchelson - Credit Suisse Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Fox Corporation Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Fox posts higher revenue on ad sales strength
text: Fox Corp. FOXA, +4.03% 's sales rose 5% in the recently ended quarter as the advertising market showed signs of strength despite macroeconomic worries.

title: This Streaming Stock Could Shake Up the Industry
text: This company is taking full aim at ad-supported video on demand.
